rationale: All 7 validate-contract gates green (G-migrate, G-export, G-seed, G-printorder, G-cascade, G-crud, G-seedorder). All PVL fixes proven on the sandbox SQL Server: F1 forced to String columns (SQL Server connector rejects Prisma enums entirely — the F1-accepted alternative), F2 printOrder Int? non-unique with app-level uniqueness, F3 off-list upsert on non-null natural key, F4 seed env self-load via side-effect import, F5 Decimal(10,3), F6 zero User rows seeded, cascade all NoAction. Schema is additive (HealthCheck retained). No customer/remote DB touched; no credentials/secrets written. Decision-6 correction-cascade lock semantics verified against the real DB. Approval is conditional on the orchestrator-owned EVL independent re-run confirming the same gates.
conditions: EVL (vc-tester) must independently re-run pnpm prisma migrate status / pnpm test / seed idempotency to confirm.
Seeded Thai names remain needsConfirmation until user confirms; not asserted correct.
One deviation logged (enum -> String) — within validate-contract F1 accepted alternative, no user gate required.
